parameters.query: SELECT p.slug, p.name, p.category, p.health_score, p.skill_count, p.function_count, p.endpoint_count, COALESCE(l.learning_count, 0) as learnings, COALESCE(o.opp_count, 0) as open_opps FROM brain_projects p LEFT JOIN (SELECT source, COUNT(*) as learning_count FROM brain_learnings GROUP BY source) l ON p.slug = l.source LEFT JOIN (SELECT unnest(string_to_array(affected_projects, ',')) as proj, COUNT(*) as opp_count FROM brain_opportunities WHERE status = 'open' GROUP BY proj) o ON p.slug = o.proj ORDER BY p.health_score ASC, p.skill_count DESC

SELECT p1.slug as project1, p2.slug as project2, p1.category, p2.category as category2, p1.tech_stack FROM brain_projects p1 CROSS JOIN brain_projects p2 WHERE p1.id < p2.id AND p1.category = p2.category AND p1.slug NOT IN (SELECT from_project FROM brain_cross_references WHERE to_project = p2.slug) LIMIT 20

SELECT p.slug, p.name, p.category, CASE WHEN p.endpoint_count = 0 AND p.function_count > 20 THEN 'Add API layer' WHEN p.skill_count = 0 THEN 'Create skills' WHEN p.health_score < 50 THEN 'Health critical' WHEN p.compliance_score < 70 THEN 'Compliance fix needed' ELSE 'Optimize further' END as suggestion, p.health_score, p.compliance_score FROM brain_projects p WHERE p.health_score < 80 OR p.skill_count = 0 OR p.endpoint_count = 0 ORDER BY p.health_score ASC

INSERT INTO brain_opportunities (title, opportunity_type, description, affected_projects, estimated_impact, estimated_effort, priority_score) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO brain_events (event_type, data, source) VALUES ('opportunity.scan.completed', $1::jsonb, 'opportunity-finder')
